name: @corvus-dotnet/arazzo-control-plane-ui
description: Zero-build, framework-agnostic web-component kit for the Arazzo workflow control-plane REST API.
author: endjin

scripts.build:vendor: esbuild vendor/codemirror-entry.js --bundle --format=esm --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js='/* Vendored CodeMirror 6 bundle for @corvus-dotnet/arazzo-control-plane-ui. MIT-licensed: CodeMirror (c) Marijn Haverbeke and others — https://codemirror.net/ ; @codemirror/state, view, language, autocomplete, commands and @lezer/highlight. Rebuild: npm run build:vendor (see vendor/codemirror-entry.js). */' --outfile=src/vendor/codemirror.mjs
scripts.test: node --test test/client.test.mjs test/conformance.test.mjs test/workflow-graph.test.mjs test/workflow-layout.test.mjs test/expression-language.test.mjs test/operation-templates.test.mjs
scripts.test:browser: npm run test:components && npm run test:smoke
